card.no_entity: Select a Ladestellen Austria sensor in the card editor.
card.no_stations: No stations match the current filters.

parking.description: Single station, points rendered as parking slots viewed from above.
parking.pick_station_hint: Pick one station from the sensor. The card shows that station's charging points as parking slots.
parking.no_station_selected: Pick a station in the card editor.
parking.station_not_found: The selected station is not in the sensor's current results.
parking.no_points: No charging points reported for this station.

editor.name: Card title (optional)
editor.logo_adapt_to_theme: Adapt logo to theme (black on light, white on dark)
editor.connector_filter_hint: Tap connector types to only show stations offering at least one of them. Empty = no filter.
editor.amenity_filter_hint: Tap amenities to narrow to stations offering all selected features (AND). Empty = no filter.
editor.payment_filter_hint: Tap payment methods to only show stations accepting at least one of them. Empty = no filter.
editor.hint_compliance: Data is supplied under the ladestellen.at Terms of Use. The E-Control branding in the header and the 'Datenquelle: E-Control' footer are legally required and cannot be hidden.
editor.pin_hint: Pinned stations always appear first and bypass filters. They still count toward the display cap above.
editor.pin_select_sensor_first: Select a sensor first to see available stations.
editor.pin_no_stations_yet: No stations returned yet — wait for the next refresh.
editor.pin_orphans_heading: Pinned but not in range (click to remove):
